evals.prompt: My classifier instructions are mediocre and I want to automatically find better ones. I have 100 labeled examples. How do I use COPRO?
evals.expected_output: Sets up dspy.COPRO with metric, breadth, and depth to search for better instructions

assertions.name: uses_copro_constructor
assertions.description: Uses dspy.COPRO with metric, breadth, and depth parameters

assertions.name: keyword_only_compile_args
assertions.description: Calls optimizer.compile(program, trainset=trainset, eval_kwargs=...) with trainset and eval_kwargs as keyword arguments

assertions.name: shows_baseline_eval
assertions.description: Shows how to evaluate before and after optimization to confirm improvement

assertions.name: breadth_greater_than_one
assertions.description: Does NOT set breadth=1 — breadth must be >1 for meaningful candidate search

evals.prompt: I ran COPRO but want to see what instructions it tried. How do I inspect the candidates?
evals.expected_output: Accesses candidate_programs on the optimized program to inspect all tried instructions and their scores

assertions.name: accesses_candidate_programs
assertions.description: Accesses optimized.candidate_programs to get all evaluated candidates

assertions.name: sorts_by_score
assertions.description: Shows how to sort candidates by score to find top performers

assertions.name: mentions_total_calls
assertions.description: Mentions optimized.total_calls for tracking LM cost

assertions.name: suggests_track_stats
assertions.description: Suggests track_stats=True for per-iteration statistics (results_best, results_latest)

evals.prompt: Should I use COPRO or MIPROv2 for my optimization? I want both better instructions and few-shot examples.
evals.expected_output: Recommends MIPROv2 since it optimizes both instructions and demos, while COPRO only optimizes instructions

assertions.name: explains_copro_instructions_only
assertions.description: Explains that COPRO only optimizes instructions, not few-shot demos

assertions.name: recommends_miprov2
assertions.description: Recommends MIPROv2 for combined instruction + demo optimization

assertions.name: states_when_copro_preferred
assertions.description: Notes when COPRO is still preferred — instruction-only control, candidate inspection, explicit breadth/depth tuning

assertions.name: does_not_recommend_copro_for_combined
assertions.description: Does NOT recommend COPRO for the combined instruction+demo case
